# Volante (VolPay)

US-based, payment hub vendor. ISO 20022-native, instant-payments certified.

- **Type**: Payment hub
- **Strengths**: ISO 20022 depth, multi-rail orchestration, message translation
- **Used by**: many tier-1 + tier-2 banks globally
- **Cloud**: SaaS + on-prem

## Mapped components

[[../architecture/sct-inst-logical|Payment Hub]] · CSM Adapter · Translation
